import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    def find_object(grid, tile_id, color_id):
        mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == tile_id) & (grid[:, :, 1] == color_id)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    # Current state
    pyr_y_s, pyr_x_s, pyr_count_s = find_object(state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_s, sq_x_s, sq_count_s = find_object(state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    agent_y_s = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_s = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_s = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)
    holding_s_f = holding_s.astype(jnp.float32)

    # Next state
    pyr_y_n, pyr_x_n, pyr_count_n = find_object(next_state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_n, sq_x_n, sq_count_n = find_object(next_state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    agent_y_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_n = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)
    holding_n_f = holding_n.astype(jnp.float32)

    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # Phase transitions
    just_picked_up = (~holding_s) & holding_n
    just_put_down = holding_s & (~holding_n)

    # ===== SUCCESS CONDITION =====
    pyr_on_grid_n = pyr_count_n > 0.5
    dist_pyr_sq_n = jnp.abs(pyr_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_n - sq_x_n)
    dist_pyr_sq_s = jnp.abs(pyr_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_s - sq_x_s)

    success = pyr_on_grid_n & (~holding_n) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    success_reward = success.astype(jnp.float32) * 10.0

    # ===== PHASE 1: Not holding → approach pyramid =====
    dist_agent_pyr_n = jnp.abs(agent_y_n - pyr_y_n) + jnp.abs(agent_x_n - pyr_x_n)
    dist_agent_pyr_s = jnp.abs(agent_y_s - pyr_y_s) + jnp.abs(agent_x_s - pyr_x_s)

    # Progress-based: reward getting closer to pyramid
    phase1_progress = (dist_agent_pyr_s - dist_agent_pyr_n) / max_dist
    phase1_reward = (1.0 - holding_s_f) * (1.0 - holding_n_f) * phase1_progress * 3.0

    # ===== PICKUP MILESTONE =====
    pickup_bonus = just_picked_up.astype(jnp.float32) * 3.0

    # ===== PHASE 2: Holding → get adjacent to square =====
    dist_agent_sq_n = jnp.abs(agent_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(agent_x_n - sq_x_n)
    dist_agent_sq_s = jnp.abs(agent_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(agent_x_s - sq_x_s)

    # Progress toward square while holding
    phase2_progress = (dist_agent_sq_s - dist_agent_sq_n) / max_dist
    phase2_reward = holding_s_f * holding_n_f * phase2_progress * 3.0

    # Extra bonus for being very close to square while holding (distance <= 2)
    very_close_to_sq = holding_n_f * jnp.maximum(0.0, 3.0 - dist_agent_sq_n) / 3.0 * 1.0

    # ===== PUTDOWN REWARD =====
    # Reward based on where pyramid lands relative to square
    putdown_adjacent = just_put_down & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5)
    putdown_close = just_put_down & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 1.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 3.0)
    putdown_far = just_put_down & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 3.0)

    putdown_reward = (
        putdown_adjacent.astype(jnp.float32) * 8.0
        + putdown_close.astype(jnp.float32) * 1.0
        + putdown_far.astype(jnp.float32) * (-1.0)
    )

    # ===== PYRAMID-SQUARE PROXIMITY (when placed) =====
    # When pyramid is on grid and not held, reward improvement in pyr-sq distance
    pyr_placed_s = (~holding_s) & (pyr_count_s > 0.5)
    pyr_placed_n = (~holding_n) & pyr_on_grid_n
    pyr_placed_both = pyr_placed_s & pyr_placed_n & (~just_put_down)
    placement_progress = pyr_placed_both.astype(jnp.float32) * (dist_pyr_sq_s - dist_pyr_sq_n) / max_dist * 2.0

    total_reward = (
        phase1_reward
        + pickup_bonus
        + phase2_reward
        + very_close_to_sq
        + putdown_reward
        + placement_progress
        + success_reward
    )

    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
